The remediation has been completed successfully. The permissions on `/etc/shadow-` have been set to `0000` as required by the OpenSCAP rule `file_permissions_backup_etc_shadow`. This ensures the backup file for password hashes is properly secured with restrictive permissions.

The verification scan will run automatically after this session to confirm the fix.
